description: Independent upstream source provenance: the frozen PyPI transformers 5.13.1 wheel was fetched and its sha256 verified against the pinned upstream identity; the admitted source files were extracted independently from the wheel and bound by equality to the installed bytes. This resolves the expected-digest INDEPENDENCE gate that blocked the runtime conversion admission. Aggregate-only; public library identities only.

independence_result.note: the installed transformers 5.13.1 conversion/loader/model source files are byte-identical to the immutable PyPI wheel; the source-digest binding is now non-self-bound

remaining_for_full_runtime_admission.full_live_closure_hardening: bind the installed distribution via importlib.metadata.distribution() RECORD/WHEEL/METADATA ownership; derive the live source closure from the actual imported objects (inspect.getsourcefile) for the dispatch callable + every converter + every nested operation + model classes; clean-subprocess isolation detecting in-memory monkeypatching; bind the loader entry point; 10 adversarial integration tests
remaining_for_full_runtime_admission.gptq_runtime_tuple: exact immutable Optimum/GPTQModel+Defuser/BACKEND.GPTQ_TORCH tuple for the differentiable fixture -- operator decision
remaining_for_full_runtime_admission.then: synthetic differentiable fixture; Phase-0 conjunction; weights; authorized GPU transition; exact forward + activation VJP/JVP parity; lens fit

privacy: aggregate-only; public library wheel identity + booleans, no host paths/private digests, tensor values, weights, caches
